form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 10th over 2875m at Enghien, beaten 74m by Lelizia in 5yo mare race on March 24 at $76. Before that 4th over 2100m at this track beaten 11m by Lady Ducale in 5yo mare race on February 17 at $36. Impossible to tip with any confidence.

form.formComment: Returns to racing after a spell of nine months. Well beaten at the end of her last preparation when sixth at very long odds behind Lady De Neuilly. Hasn't won for two-and-a-half years, so it's hard to be over-confident.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start by 1.3m (25m) at Pontchateau beating Laurel in 5yo handicap on March 29 at $5.70. Hard to beat in this sort of form.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (25m) over 2875m at Meslay-du-Maine, beaten 38m by Laura De Touchyvon in 5yo mare handicap on March 17 at $28. Before that, unplaced over 2700m at this track well beaten by Lovely Wilma in 5yo mare euro open restricted race on February 27 at $21. Cannot be left out of calculations.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 8th over 2150m at Enghien, beaten 18m by Lannister D'avril in 5-6yo claiming on March 24 at $64. Before that 6th over 2300m at Marseille-Borely, beaten 17m by London Recall in 5-6yo race on March 13 at $66. This race looks too tough.

form.formComment: Last start 11th over 2825m at Le Crois?-Laroche, well beaten by Love Kills in 5yo race on March 30 at $170. Two runs back won by 2.7m at this track beating Louisiane Girl in 5yo mare race on January 1 at $19. Fitter and open to plenty of improvement.

form.formComment: Finished up last campaign with a win at Caen, but hasn't been as effective this campaign with a first-up effort 12th (25m) over 2800m at Vire well beaten by Laldo Louzeen in 5yo handicap on March 18 at $83. Then last start 9th over 2875m at Enghien beaten 61m by Lelizia in 5yo mare race on March 24 at $63. No surprise if she took this out.

Then last start 9th over 2875m at Enghien beaten 61m by Lelizia in 5yo mare race on March 24 at $63. No surprise if she took this out.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start disqualified at Enghien on March 24 over 2875m. The start before unplaced over 2850m at this track well beaten by Legende Indigo in 5yo mare race on February 16 at $17. Watch for a far better effort this time.

form.formComment: Last start by 1.3m at Graignes beating Lady Major in 5yo mare race on March 15 at $5. Another win looks on the cards.

form.formComment: Last start 4th over 2550m at Reims beaten 9m by Sammy Boy in 5-6yo euro open restricted race on March 19 at $7.30. Two runs back 3rd over 2450m at Caen, beaten 8.3m by Lempicka Sept in 5-6yo race on March 12 at $8.90. Needs to lift.

form.formComment: Last start 13th (25m) over 2725m at Lisieux, beaten 34m by Lumiere Blue in 5yo mare handicap on March 26 at $80. Before that, a game effort when 2nd over 2725m at Graignes beaten 1.3m by Lady Angele in 5yo mare race on March 15 at $35. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Good run 2.6L second behind Lumiere Blue at Caen over 2200m 5yo mare race on March 5. Was disqualified last start on April 6 at Strasbourg over 2825m 5-6yo race. Ignore last run and assess on its second two starts back; Can make amends.
